differential_diagnoses: Progressive multifocal leukoencephalopathy (PML) - granule cell neuronopathy (GCN)
Leptomeningeal recurrence of diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL)
next_steps: CSF PCR for JC virus (including testing for granule cell neuronopathy)
CSF PCR for a comprehensive viral panel (EBV, VZV, HHV-6, West Nile, Powassan)
Repeat CSF cytology and flow cytometry with immunohistochemistry for B-cell markers
Serum and CSF paraneoplastic antibody panel
Repeat brain MRI with attention to contrast enhancement patterns
Consultation with infectious disease and neurology subspecialists
Perform CSF PCR for JC virus (specifically for GCN detection)
Perform CSF EBER in situ hybridization to screen for EBV-associated lymphoma cells
Send CSF for comprehensive viral PCR panel (including HHV-6, VZV, West Nile, Powassan)
Repeat lumbar puncture with cytology, flow cytometry, and immunohistochemistry for B-cell markers
Perform brain biopsy if CSF studies remain non-diagnostic to rule out lymphoma vs. viral encephalitis
Consult neurology, infectious disease, and oncology for multidisciplinary management
